channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Cómo será la agenda del CIO en Europa en 2025 y en los próximos años
item.description: En el último informe publicado por IDC con las 10 predicciones críticas para los CIO de todo el mundo, se pone de manifiesto, de cara a 2025, el papel fundamental que tiene la tecnología para impulsar el éxito empresarial en Europa, que nunca había sido tan evidente.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: AI vaporware: 7 products that didn’t materialize in 2024
item.description: Whether to raise money, placate shareholders, or generate positive press, AI’s biggest companies have a habit of announcing advancements that are nowhere near ready to ship.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: Revealed: The 10 most popular and worst passwords of 2024
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson cites a new report that says many people still use weak passwords like "123456," risking their accounts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The best new Windows 11 features of 2024
item.description: Microsoft is a little sneaky. Sure, there’s just one “big” update for Windows 11 each year. But Microsoft’s Windows team is always working on something, and new Windows 11 features are arriving on PCs every month — even outside of those high-profile updates.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 7 azioni chiave da intraprendere nel 2025 per un CIO sempre più autorevole
item.description: Nei prossimi 12 mesi i CIO hanno due grandi priorità: sviluppare un solido business case per la spesa in infrastruttura per l’intelligenza artificiale e aumentare la cybersicurezza e la resilienza.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Travel Troubleshooter: Error message occurs when using Chase points for travel
item.description: When Carlye Siegel tries to book two award tickets with Chase points, the transaction fails. Now Chase won't refund the points.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Elliott, King Features Syndicate, Inc., The Mercury News

item.title: Over 800,000 electric car owners and drivers may have had private info exposed online
item.description: Data from 800,000 Audi, SEAT, Skoda and Volkswagen cars was stored insecurely in an Amazon cloud folder.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Los mejores casos de éxito del 2024 constatan la alianza entre TI y negocio
item.description: La transformación digital ha formado parte inherente de las agendas de empresas, organizaciones e instituciones de diversa naturaleza y tipología.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: These glasses let you 'see' conversations in real time
item.description: When I heard about AI glasses that let you "see" what people are saying, I was skeptical. But after trying them on, I was proven wrong.
item.dc:creator: Rich DeMuro, NewsNation

item.title: 2024 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Tech Resolutions 2025 – 7 ways to survive January and upgrade your life with tech this year
item.description: Looking to upgrade your tech life in 2024? Here are 14 ways the TechRadar team is doing it –and how you can do the same.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: The highs and lows of commercial real estate in 2024: Bay Area offices, hotels and apartments falter, but tech deals offer hope
item.description: Widening loan defaults and foreclosures haunted Bay Area office, hotel and apartment properties in 2024 but a flurry of tech leases are creating some hope.
item.dc:creator: George Avalos, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple Mail app redesign introduces new categorization feature in iOS 18.2
item.description: In iOS 18.2 and later, Apple's Mail app enhances email management by automatically sorting messages into distinct categories to help find emails faster.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Musk writes op-ed backing far-right German political party
item.description: Tech billionaire Elon Musk penned an op-ed further expressing support for the far-right German political party Alternative for Germany (AfD). In response, the paper’s commentary editor resigned in protest.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Tech investor Cathie Wood on how Trump can boost the U.S. economy
item.description: U.S. tech investor Cathie Wood is calling on Donald Trump’s incoming administration to boost economic growth and policy certainty by backdating promised corporate and personal tax cuts to Jan. 1, 2025, she told Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Trump asks Supreme Court to delay TikTok ban so he can weigh in after he takes office
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has asked the Supreme Court to pause the potential TikTok ban from going into effect until his administration can pursue a “political resolution” to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Maintaining compliance in government agencies with rich text editors
item.description: Learn how rich text editors help government agencies ensure compliance with data security, accessibility, and document standardization. The post Maintaining compliance in government agencies with rich text editors first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Scammers are targeting teens with these nasty tricks
item.description: Cybercriminals have more ways than ever to target teenagers; here are some of the most widespread scams and tricks to watch in order to keep your loved ones safe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: New York state government to monitor its use of AI under a new law
item.description: ALBANY, N.Y. (AP) — New York state government agencies will have to conduct reviews and publish reports that detail how they're using artificial intelligence software, under a new law signed by Gov. Kathy Hochul.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: People who visit adult or gambling websites double their risk of malware
item.description: Visiting adult and gambling websites doubles the risk of inadvertently installing malware onto work devices, according to a new study. Fabio Massacci at the University of Trento and Vrije University in Amsterdam presented the findings of a massive analysis of real-life data from around the world.
item.dc:creator: Chris Stokel-Walker, Fast Company

item.title: Undersea power cable linking Finland and Estonia hit by outage, prompting investigation
item.description: FRANKFURT, Germany (AP) — A power cable linking Finland and Estonia under the Baltic Sea suffered an outage, prompting an investigation, Finnish Prime Minister Petteri Orpo said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Windows PC Tips for 2024: Productivity, Customizations, and More
item.description: Discover the best Windows PC tips of 2024, covering productivity upgrades, computer customizations, features to try, and excellent apps to install.
item.dc:creator: Computer World
